description: Tests that the memory-report skill correctly runs asm-analyze memmap, interprets the JSON output, and reports section breakdowns, ROM/RAM summaries, top consumers, delta comparisons, and optional region budgets. Primary test ELF is $LOCI_TEST_BLE_ROOT/CC2340R5/basic_ble.out.
note: Set $LOCI_TEST_BLE_ROOT to your local BLE project root before running.

evals.prompt: Analyze the ROM/RAM memory usage of $LOCI_TEST_BLE_ROOT/examples/rtos/LP_EM_CC2340R5/ble5stack/basic_ble/freertos/ticlang/basic_ble.out. No map file — just show me the section breakdown, summary, and top consumers. Session says Target: armv7e-m, Compiler: arm-none-eabi-gcc, LOCI target: armv7e-m.
evals.expected_output: Runs asm-analyze memmap with --elf-path pointing to basic_ble.out. Reports a section breakdown table with section names, addresses, sizes, types, and memory regions. Reports ROM/RAM summary totals with code/rodata/data/bss breakdown. Reports top ROM consumers (functions) and top RAM consumers (variables) by size. Does not report memory region budgets since no map file was provided (memory_regions is null).

assertions.text: Response runs asm-analyze memmap with --elf-path pointing to basic_ble.out
assertions.description: Must use the memmap subcommand with the correct ELF path

assertions.text: Response includes a section breakdown with section names, sizes, types (code/rodata/data/bss), and memory regions (ROM/RAM)
assertions.description: The section table is the core structural output of a memory report

assertions.text: Response includes a ROM/RAM summary with total byte counts and a breakdown into code, rodata, data, and bss
assertions.description: Summary totals are required for quick assessment of memory usage

assertions.text: Response lists top ROM consumers (functions by size) and top RAM consumers (variables by size)
assertions.description: Top consumers help identify optimization targets

assertions.text: Response does NOT show memory region budgets or usage percentages
assertions.description: No map file was provided, so region budget information should be absent

evals.prompt: Show me the memory usage of $LOCI_TEST_BLE_ROOT/examples/rtos/LP_EM_CC2340R5/ble5stack/basic_ble/freertos/ticlang/basic_ble.out with the linker map file at $LOCI_TEST_BLE_ROOT/examples/rtos/LP_EM_CC2340R5/ble5stack/basic_ble/freertos/ticlang/basic_ble.map. I want to see how much of each memory region is used. Session says Target: armv7e-m, Compiler: arm-none-eabi-gcc, LOCI target: armv7e-m.
evals.expected_output: Runs asm-analyze memmap with --elf-path pointing to basic_ble.out and --map-file pointing to basic_ble.map. Reports section breakdown, ROM/RAM summary, and top consumers as in a normal report. Additionally reports memory region budgets showing per-region used bytes, total bytes, and usage percentage. If the map file is not found or cannot be parsed, the report still completes but notes that memory regions are unavailable.

assertions.text: Response runs asm-analyze memmap with --elf-path and --map-file flags
assertions.description: Both the ELF path and map file path must be passed to the command

assertions.text: Response includes the standard section breakdown and ROM/RAM summary
assertions.description: Map file should add to the report, not replace the base sections

assertions.text: Response includes memory region budgets with used/total bytes and usage percentage per region, OR notes that the map file was not found or could not be parsed
assertions.description: Region budgets are the key added value of the map file; graceful fallback if absent

evals.prompt: Compare memory usage between two builds. The new binary is $LOCI_TEST_BLE_ROOT/examples/rtos/LP_EM_CC2340R5/ble5stack/basic_ble/freertos/ticlang/basic_ble.out and the old binary is $LOCI_TEST_BLE_ROOT/examples/rtos/LP_EM_CC2340R5/ble5stack/data_stream/freertos/ticlang/data_stream.out. Show me what changed. Session says Target: armv7e-m, Compiler: arm-none-eabi-gcc, LOCI target: armv7e-m.
evals.expected_output: Runs asm-analyze memmap with --elf-path pointing to basic_ble.out and --comparing-elf-path pointing to data_stream.out. Reports section deltas showing before/after/delta sizes for each section. Reports ROM/RAM summary deltas with total changes and percentages. Reports symbol-level deltas showing added, removed, or changed symbols sorted by delta size. Does not report memory region budget deltas since no map file was provided.

assertions.text: Response runs asm-analyze memmap with --elf-path and --comparing-elf-path flags
assertions.description: Delta mode requires both ELF paths to compare

assertions.text: Response shows section-level deltas with before, after, and delta sizes
assertions.description: Per-section comparison is the foundation of a delta report

assertions.text: Response shows ROM/RAM summary deltas with total byte changes
assertions.description: Summary deltas give the high-level impact of the change

assertions.text: Response shows symbol-level deltas identifying added, removed, or changed symbols
assertions.description: Symbol deltas pinpoint exactly which functions/variables grew or shrank

assertions.text: Response does NOT show memory region budget deltas
assertions.description: No map file was provided, so region budget comparison should be absent

evals.prompt: I have a compiled object file at build/sensor_driver.o. Analyze its memory usage. Session says Target: armv7e-m, Compiler: arm-none-eabi-gcc, LOCI target: armv7e-m.
evals.expected_output: Runs asm-analyze memmap with --elf-path pointing to build/sensor_driver.o. Recognizes it as a relocatable object file (not a linked executable). Reports section sizes and types but notes that addresses are zero-based (no linker placement). Reports ROM and RAM estimates. Notes that memory regions are not available for object files. Does not attempt to use a map file.

assertions.text: Response runs asm-analyze memmap with --elf-path pointing to the .o file
assertions.description: The memmap subcommand handles both linked ELFs and relocatable .o files

assertions.text: Response identifies the file as relocatable and notes that addresses are zero-based or that memory regions are not available
assertions.description: Object files have no linked addresses and no memory region assignment

assertions.text: Response reports section sizes and ROM/RAM estimates
assertions.description: Even without linking, section sizes provide useful ROM/RAM estimates

assertions.text: Response does NOT pass --map-file or report memory region budgets
assertions.description: Map files are not applicable to unlinked object files
